heading: SCHOOL DISTRICT TEACHING PERMIT
operative_text: As provided by this section, a school district may issue a school district teaching permit and employ as a teacher of record a person who does not hold a teaching certificate issued by the board on approval by the district's board of trustees.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: a school district may issue a school district teaching permit and employ as a teacher of record a person who does not hold a teaching certificate issued by the board on approval by the district's board of trustees.

_note: Statute provides eligibility requirements (baccalaureate degree or paraprofessional pathway), commissioner notification and review process, CTE-only exemption under (d-1), and portability restrictions under (e). Last amended by Acts 2025, 89th Leg., Ch. 1065 (H.B. 2), Sec. 2.11, eff. June 20, 2025.
